evals.expected_output: git status/diff 분석, Conventional Commits 포맷, commitlint 검증
expectations: Runs git status to check current changes
Runs git diff to analyze change content
Runs commitlint to validate commit message before committing

evals.prompt: 로그인 기능 구현한 코드를 feat 타입으로 커밋해줘
evals.expected_output: feat: 타입 사용, 변경 내용 분석 기반 메시지
expectations: Uses feat type in commit message
Analyzes actual diff content to write descriptive subject
Validates with commitlint before final commit

evals.prompt: 버그 수정 커밋 만들어줘. 수정 내용을 자동으로 파악해서 메시지 작성해줘
evals.expected_output: fix: 타입 사용, diff 분석 기반 자동 메시지 생성
expectations: Runs git diff to understand what was changed
Uses fix type in commit message
Generates descriptive message based on actual changes
